description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure with a muscular build, adorned with tribal body paint and jewelry. The individual wears a short, fur-like skirt and has fur-covered lower legs, giving a distinctive, almost mythological appearance. The upper body is bare except for decorative arm and neck bands, and the figure holds a long spear in one hand. The face is marked with paint and the hair is styled short and swept to one side. The overall look suggests a warrior or hunter, blending traditional and fantasy elements. The stance is alert and ready, with a confident posture and a strong grip on the spear.
description: A stylized adult figure with tribal body paint, jewelry, fur skirt, and fur-covered legs, holding a long spear and standing in a confident, alert posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial paint, jewelry, bare upper body, fur skirt, and spear held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm bands, and the full length of the spear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, fur skirt, and fur-covered legs, with the spear visible behind the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, arm bands, and the spear extending outward.
attribute_clothing_type: tribal-style fur skirt, decorative arm and neck bands, body paint
